title: OAuth2 callback insufficient parameters for Excel
symptom: When attempting to connect n8n to Excel, the error 'Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback' is displayed, indicating a failure in the connection process.
not_this_if: Error occurs with other nodes or authentication methods
root_cause: The error occurs because the OAuth2 callback is missing required parameters, often due to insufficient permissions or scopes not being granted during the authorization process.
fix_steps: Check the authorization popup for any permissions checkboxes
Ensure that the required scopes (Files.Read and/or Files.ReadWrite) are added to your Microsoft App
agent_instruction: Verify and grant the necessary permissions and scopes for the Excel connection.
